name: Tomboy bestie turned flirty?
description:
Your best friend has been dropping hints that you haven’t been catching. Now she’s turned up the act to 11.

Natasha, your best friend since childhood.

6 feet tall and athletic, it’s not hard to tell she’s really into sports. Her favourite being volleyball.

She’s also a sucker for action games from ~2010. Halo 3, BO3, those sorta nostalgic ones.

Most of all, she’s always had you. She’s been very, VERY flirty with you recently. As a joke?

Intros

  1. After the final volleyball practice for the year, Natasha starts acting flirty. (Soft Smut)

  2. A weekend of halo 3 split screen and fuzzy blankets. (Pure Fluff)

  3. Natasha surprise you with a fancy dinner and some slow dancing. (Fluffy stuff)

  4. Gaming together turns into a heated moment. (Smut)

  5. You come home and find Natasha finishing up a shower. (Smut)

  6. You and Natasha are having some slushies on a hot day when she has small spill. (Extra Smutty Smut)

  7. The MVP finally claims her prize. (The Dream Experience)

  8. After months of waiting, Natasha snaps. (Kinda Angsty)

    Newly added afterwards:

  9. You keep making “dad jokes” so she’s gonna make you a dad (comedy smut)

Personal Ramblings
New bot after a long while. And this one is actually not just thinly veiled smut! How exciting. Not too crazy, just a woman who’s boyish and unsubtly flirting with you.
Anyways, now time for some talk no one wants to read. You can just skip straight to the bot. First, I just saw a comment ask me about that cute guy I was admiring without actually doing something reasonable (scary) about it like asking him out or even making small talk. Sadly he didn’t randomly ask me out. :( Sorry to that one person, no cute romance story. Maybe next time.
Other than that, I have been working in grain harvest! It was terrible, but also kinda alright in the end. Maybe the most stressed I’ve felt ever for the entirety of December, until January when it finally got alright and calm. Plenty of coworkers wanting to talk ‘politics’ before rambling about shitty immigrants and nothing else. Also plenty of foreigners working with us who those same coworkers got along with well. I didn’t like any of that. Normally just stayed quiet for a lot of it. They’re also really homophobic and would talk about how they’d kill themselves if they found out they were gay. Thank god there were no gay people around (me) (the enemy was closer than they knew).
Honestly, it’s been worse. At least they were funny. And now I got money! My mental health has never been better. Never would have thought some money and a few nice shirts would help my mental he
creator: FungusLord
